FEIYAP_CARD_MI_WANG.title: Mi Wang
FEIYAP_CARD_MI_WANG.description:
Cannot be played until the quest is complete.
Complete after dealing [blue]{Goal}[/blue] damage with [gold]Attacks[/gold].
When played, remove this card and gain the Investigator relic.
(Progress: [blue]{Progress}[/blue]/[blue]{Goal}[/blue])
FEIYAP_CARD_KU_XIU.title: Ku Xiu
FEIYAP_CARD_KU_XIU.description:
Cannot be played until the quest is complete.
Complete after dealing [blue]{Goal}[/blue] damage with [gold]Iaido[/gold].
When played, remove this card and gain the Sword Saint relic.
(Progress: [blue]{Progress}[/blue]/[blue]{Goal}[/blue])
FEIYAP_CARD_FA_WEI.title: Fa Wei
FEIYAP_CARD_FA_WEI.description:
Cannot be played until the quest is complete.
Complete after alternating [gold]Attacks[/gold] and [gold]Skills[/gold] [blue]{Goal}[/blue] times.
When played, remove this card and gain the Merry Witch relic.
(Progress: [blue]{Progress}[/blue]/[blue]{Goal}[/blue])
FEIYAP_CARD_KE_XUE_ZHENG.title: Ke Xue Zheng
FEIYAP_CARD_KE_XUE_ZHENG.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
While in your hand, each time you take damage, gain 1 additional attack hit.
(Extra hits stored: [blue]{ExtraHits}[/blue])
{IfUpgraded:show:While in your hand, if your HP is below 1, restore to 1, then play and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] this card.|}
FEIYAP_CARD_FEI_YING_YU_HUA_LUO.title: Fei Ying Yu Hua Luo
FEIYAP_CARD_FEI_YING_YU_HUA_LUO.descript:
This turn, [gold]Iaido[/gold] becomes ∞.{IfUpgraded:show:
This turn, all [gold]Iaido[/gold] counts as [gold]Perfect Iaido[/gold].|}
FEIYAP_CARD_WORLD_XXI.title: XXI - World
FEIYAP_CARD_WORLD_XXI.description:
[gold]Tarot - Upright[/gold]: All [gold]Tarot[/gold] cards can freely choose to trigger their upright or reversed effect.
[gold]Tarot - Reversed[/gold]: All [gold]Tarot[/gold] cards trigger both their upright and reversed effects.
FEIYAP_CARD_WORLD_XXI.selectionPrompt: Choose Tarot cards to create in your hand.
FEIYAP_CARD_WORLD_SHARDS.title: World Shards
FEIYAP_CARD_WORLD_SHARDS.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} card.
At the start of your turn, gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold], [gold]Dexterity[/gold], [gold]Focus[/gold], [gold]Block[/gold], [gold]Iaido[/gold], [gold]Vigor[/gold], [gold]Zanxin[/gold], [gold]Thorns[/gold], and [gold]Plating[/gold].

FEIYAP_CARD_FEIYAP_RARE4.description:
Can only be played after triggering [gold]Perfect Iaido[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
FEIYAP_CARD_FEIYAP_RARE4.smartDescriptio:
Can only be played after triggering [gold]Perfect Iaido[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
FEIYAP_CARD_FEIYAP_RARE5.title: Frost-Thunder Flash
FEIYAP_CARD_FEIYAP_RARE5.description:
Instantly kills non-Elite enemies.
If the target is Elite or above, only triggers when HP is below {ExecuteThreshold:diff()}%.
At end of turn, if this is in your hand, gain {Iaido:diff()} [gold]Iaido[/gold].
FEIYAP_CARD_FEIYAP_RARE5.smartDescriptio:

If the target is Elite or above, only triggers when HP is below {ExecuteThreshold:diff()}%.
At end of turn, if this is in your hand, gain {Iaido:diff()} [gold]Iaido[/gold].
FEIYAP_CARD_FEIYAP_RARE6.title: XIX - The Sun
FEIYAP_CARD_FEIYAP_RARE6.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
While in your hand, after you play an [gold]Attack[/gold], deal {TriggerDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies, then transform into XVIII - The Moon.
FEIYAP_CARD_FEIYAP_RARE6.smartDescriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
While in your hand, after you play an [gold]Attack[/gold], deal {TriggerDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies, then transform into XVIII - The Moon.
FEIYAP_CARD_FEIYAP_RARE9.title: Lingering Wind
FEIYAP_CARD_FEIYAP_RARE9.description:
Gain [gold]Iaido[/gold] equal to damage dealt this turn.
(Recorded: [blue]{RecordedDamage}[/blue])
FEIYAP_CARD_FEIYAP_RARE9.smartDescriptio:
Gain [gold]Iaido[/gold] equal to damage dealt this turn.
(Recorded: [blue]{RecordedDamage}[/blue])
FEIYAP_CARD_FEIYAP_RARE10.title: Ikuseisou
FEIYAP_CARD_FEIYAP_RARE10.description:
Gain {Iaido:diff()} [gold]Iaido[/gold].
Whenever you draw this card, increase [gold]Iaido[/gold] gained this combat by {DrawBonus:diff()}.
FEIYAP_CARD_FEIYAP_RARE10.smartDescripti:
Gain {Iaido:diff()} [gold]Iaido[/gold].
Whenever you draw this card, increase [gold]Iaido[/gold] gained this combat by {DrawBonus:diff()}.
FEIYAP_CARD_FEIYAP_RARE11.title: Ichigo Ichie
FEIYAP_CARD_FEIYAP_RARE11.description:
Gain {Iaido:diff()} [gold]Iaido[/gold].
Retain your [gold]Iaido[/gold] until next turn.
FEIYAP_CARD_FEIYAP_RARE11.smartDescripti:
Gain {Iaido:diff()} [gold]Iaido[/gold].
Retain your [gold]Iaido[/gold] until next turn.
FEIYAP_CARD_FEIYAP_RARE12.title: XVIII - The Moon
FEIYAP_CARD_FEIYAP_RARE12.description:
ALL players gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
While in your hand, after you play a [gold]Skill[/gold], ALL players gain {TriggerBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold], then transform into XIX - The Sun.

FEIYAP_CARD_FEIYAP_RARE13.title: XIV - Temperance
FEIYAP_CARD_FEIYAP_RARE13.description:
[gold]Stun[/gold] an enemy.
While in your hand, whenever you alternate [gold]Attacks[/gold] and [gold]Skills[/gold], reduce this card's cost by 1{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.

[gold]Stun[/gold] an enemy.
While in your hand, whenever you alternate [gold]Attacks[/gold] and [gold]Skills[/gold], reduce this card's cost by 1{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
FEIYAP_CARD_FEIYAP_RARE16.title: Kachuu Fugetsu
FEIYAP_CARD_FEIYAP_RARE16.description:
When played and at the start of your turn:
Gain {FeiyapKachuuFuugetsuPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain {FeiyapKachuuFuugetsuPower:diff()} [gold]Iaido[/gold].
Gain {FeiyapKachuuFuugetsuPower:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold].
Gain {FeiyapKachuuFuugetsuPower:diff()} [gold]Zanxin[/gold].

FEIYAP_CARD_FEIYAP_RARE20.title: Kassai Jizai
FEIYAP_CARD_FEIYAP_RARE23.title: Silver Bowl Snow
FEIYAP_CARD_FEIYAP_RARE23.description: All [gold]Block[/gold] you gain is converted into [gold]Iaido[/gold].
FEIYAP_CARD_FEIYAP_RARE23.smartDescripti: All [gold]Block[/gold] you gain is converted into [gold]Iaido[/gold].
FEIYAP_CARD_FEIYAP_RARE24.title: V - The Hierophant
FEIYAP_CARD_FEIYAP_RARE25.title: VII - The Chariot
FEIYAP_CARD_FEIYAP_RARE25.description:
[gold]Tarot - Upright[/gold]: At the end of your turn, play {FeiyapChariotPower:diff()} random [gold]Skill[/gold] from your [gold]Discard pile[/gold].
[gold]Tarot - Reversed[/gold]: At the end of your turn, play {FeiyapChariotPower:diff()} random [gold]Attacks[/gold] from your [gold]Discard pile[/gold].
FEIYAP_CARD_FEIYAP_RARE25.smartDescripti:
